label: Flash Loan Builder
description: Compose multi-step flash loan bundles with borrow and repay legs, P&L preview, and execution simulation.

0.7.note: Empty-state message added when flashSteps is empty.

1.1.note: All data via useDeFiData() hook only.

1.4.note: No explicit clientIds cascade — org-level only.

1.5.note: strategyIds filter applied to trade history.

1.7.note: SWAP_TOKENS in lib/mocks/fixtures/ — context concern, not widget.

l1.notes: All checks pass. SWAP_TOKENS location is a context-level concern.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab + f9f29ea. Re-audit only if wiring test fails.

3.1.note: live ✓ / paper ✓ / batch: Execute bundle should be disabled.

3.2.note: Context reads useGlobalScope() but does not consume scope.mode.

3.5.note: Paper mode spec: execute bundle disabled; bundle composition still interactive.

l3.notes: 3.3/3.4: Human must verify batch-mode execute disable.

4.1.note: Simulate button now has onClick stub (toast.info + disabled when no steps). Full simulation backend pending.

l4.notes: Simulate button fixed with stub. 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8: Human walkthrough required.

5.1.note: Target strategies: ARBITRAGE_PRICE_DISPERSION (flash loan arbitrage). Multi-step FLASH_BORROW + operations + FLASH_REPAY bundle.

l5.notes: 5.2-5.6: Human walkthrough required. Flash bundle execution is atomic — simulation needed.

l6.notes: L6 deferred — tests after L5 sign-off.

7.2.note: No mock data in widget file.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

8.1.note: text-[9px] at lines 50, 195 migrated to text-nano; text-[10px] at lines 70, 79 migrated to text-micro. Utilities backed by --text-micro (0.625rem) and --text-nano (0.5625rem) tokens added to globals.css @theme.

8.3.note: Button, Input, Select, Badge, Separator, FormWidget, CollapsibleSection from components/ui/* and shared.

8.4.note: Agent: no img without alt. Human: keyboard pass required.

keepSeparate.rationale: Flash loan builder is architecturally unique — multi-step atomic bundle composition not found in any other widget.

dataContract.notes: Flash loan execution is atomic — single REST call to flash loan executor service. P&L preview is client-side computed.

gaps.notes: ARBITRAGE_PRICE_DISPERSION: Flash-loan receiver contract per-chain registry missing from UAC; testnet only on some chains.
Simulate button has no onClick handler — simulation flow not implemented.
Flash loans on Solana use program-level mechanics different from EVM — not supported by this widget.

knownIssues: SWAP_TOKENS in lib/mocks/fixtures/defi-swap.ts — used by context, not widget; needs relocation.
Simulate button (line 223) has no onClick handler — dead button, L4.1 partial.

findings.description: isLoading prop missing from FormWidget call — no loading skeleton shown.
Empty state missing when flashSteps array is empty.
defi-flash-loans-widget.tsx:223 — Simulate button had no onClick handler. Dead button.
findings.fix: Added onClick with toast.info stub and disabled={flashSteps.length === 0}. Full simulation requires backend wiring.
Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: defi-flash-loans-widget.tsx:50,70,79,195 — text-[9px] and text-[10px] for sub-xs sizing.
findings.fix: Replaced text-[10px] with text-micro and text-[9px] with text-nano; utilities backed by --text-micro (0.625rem) and --text-nano (0.5625rem) tokens added to globals.css @theme.
